main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'calcium sulfite scaling' DIAGNOSTICO ERRONEO - no es scaling, off-family

key_signals.justification: C2: 7 signals correctos (sulfito 8.5, ORP -120/-180, dP, rejection, flow)

alternatives.justification: C3: 2 alts (O-rings, rinsing) - rinsing es la real causa pero descarta erroneamente

recommended_action.justification: C4: reduce P 13 bar + recovery 70% + 'low-pH cleaning citric acid 2%' - CIP fail

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: Ca permeado~Ca feed -> bypass mecanico

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Hacer CIP ácido/alcalino para 'limpiar el sulfito'
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Propone CIP acido citrico 2% para CaSO3 scale
